Petition For Fees And Discharge Of Guardian-Ad-Litem Of Minor'S Dragon Sasuke Pacheco And David Bermudez Pacheco
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Fees And Discharge Of Guardian-Ad-Litem Of Minor'S Dragon Sasuke Pacheco And David Bermudez Pacheco
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Continued To Sep-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for administrator.
Avid Alavi (Guardian Ad Litem) appeared by zoom for Dragon Pacheco and David Pacheco, Jr. (minors).

The court noted that there is a discrepancy in the numbers. Mr. Wrobel stated that he believes all of the issues have been addressed in the supplement that he filed over the weekend, that they did not make deductions for the fees and the reserve, that there were some gains and confirmed that the amount of the cash on hand is $1,046,032.89. Mrs. Alavi stated that she asked Mr. Wroble to make sure the reserve is enough to cover all of the costs, and that she is not sure that the math in the supplement is 100% accurate. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared via zoom for Ana Milian (administrator).

The Court stated that based on the Inventory and Appraisal the bond to be increased by $23,000.00, that Counsel can petition for order to increase bond by drop-off ex parte, and that the funds need to be properly insured in a secured institution and not exceed the FDIC limit. Status hearing on close of estate Is continued to September 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.
